titleStmt.title: SII 8.711: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 711. (A.R. No. 395 of 1903). ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE SAME MANDAPA.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
yāṇṭu 3vatu ṛṣabha nā
yaṟṟu tiyati patimuṉṟiṉāl ta
ṉiyūr perumpaṟṟappuliyūr pe
ruṅkavuciyaṉ tirukkaḻippālai
uṭaiyāṉ Iraviyum Ivaṉe
mutukaṇṇākauṭaiya Ivaṉ pi
rāmaṇikottalar kuḻaliyum I
vaṉe mutukaṇṇākauṭaiya Ivaṉ
makaṉ yiravi tirukkaḻippālai
uṭaiyāṉum peruṅkavi
ciyaṉ Iravi tirunaṭṭamāṭi
yum Ivaṉ tampi Iravi A
mpalattamutum Ivar tampi
Iravi śrīmulattāṉamuṭaiyā
ṉum Ivvaṉaivom kavi
ciyaṉ civaṉ tirucciṟṟampala
muṭaiyāṉukku kiraiyaccilavutaravu kuṭuttaparicāvatu . nāṅkaḷ yivaṉukku viṟṟukkuṭutta Inta pi
ramāṇappaṭiyāl vanta nilam Iraṇṭe nāṉmāvaraiyiṉ ciṉṉamum viṟṟukkuṭutta piramā
ṇappaṭi kācu 2 1000 5 100 Ikkācu Iraṇṭāyirat taññūṟum kāṭṭeṟṟi kaiccelavaṟa van
ta tecatte U
ṭaiya
paṭi nerāka kai
kkoṇṭu kiraiya
ccelavutaravu kuṭu
ttom kavuṇiyaṉ
civaṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭai
yāṉukku Ivvaṉaivom . I
varkaḷ paṇikka Eḻutiṉeṉ
ttāṉ puliyūruṭaiyāṉ peṟṟāṉ ti
llaikkūttaṉeṉ Ivai Eṉ Eḻut
tu Eṉṟum Ippaṭi cammatittu mutuka
ṇṇāyiruntu kaiccelavutaravu kuṭup
pittukuṭutteṉ peruṅkavuciyaṉ ti
rukkaḻippālaiuṭaiyāṉeṉ Ivai Eṉ
Eḻuttu Eṉṟum Ippaṭi tik
kireyaccilavutaravu kuṭuttom peru
ṅkavuciyaṉ tirunaṭṭamāṭiyeṉ Ivai
Eṉ Eḻuttu Eṉṟum Ippaṭi Aṟive
ṉākac ciyaṉ poṉṉampalakkūt
taṉ tevaṉeṉ [*] Ippaṭi cammatittu ki
raiyaccilavutaravu kuṭutteṉ Ipperu
ṅkavuciyaṉ Iravi cimulattāṉamuṭaiyā
ṉeṉ Ivai Eṉ Eḻuttu Eṉṟum Ippa
ṭi Aṟiveṉ Uḻaiccāṇaṉ tirucciṟṟam
pavamuṭaiyāṉ mātevaneṉ. Ippaṭi
Aṟiveṉ vācciyaṉ viṉāyakaṉ capā
patiyeṉ . Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ vācci
yaṉ kāri tevaṉeṉ . Ippaṭiyeṉ
Uḻaiccāṇaṉ Eṭutta ruḷiyacipāta
meṉ .
Digital edition of SII 8.711 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
